name: Net Lease Office Properties
business: Net Lease Office Properties owns a diversified portfolio of office properties that are primarily leased to corporate tenants on a single-tenant, net-lease basis. The vast majority of revenues originate from lease revenue provided by the real estate portfolio. The business plan is to focus on realizing value for shareholders primarily through strategic asset management and disposition of the property portfolio over time.

exposures.sentence: Our net leases generally specify a base rent with rent increases and require the tenant to pay substantially all costs associated with operating and maintaining the property.
Remote and hybrid working arrangements for personnel changed work practices in a manner that has negatively impacted us and our business.
